sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21055" key="broto/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βροτόπους</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἵππος</foreign> horse <sense id="n21055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with human feet</tr_>, coin-legend in Head <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Historia Numorum</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:p.517" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.517</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Nicaea</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
